description_long: This is a compact, modern two-seater sofa upholstered in a deep burgundy or maroon fabric. The sofa features a boxy, geometric silhouette with straight, wide armrests and a solid, continuous backrest. Two loose, matching throw pillows are placed at each end, adding comfort and a touch of softness to the otherwise structured form. The seat appears to be a single, unbroken cushion, providing a streamlined and minimalist look. The sofa sits low to the ground, with its legs either recessed or hidden from view, giving it a grounded and sturdy appearance. The upholstery is smooth and uniform, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, emphasizing a clean and contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater sofa in deep burgundy fabric with straight armrests, a single seat cushion, and two matching throw pillows. The design is minimalist and smooth, with hidden or recessed legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the sofa, two loose pillows, straight armrests, and a single seat cushion.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the sofa's depth, the thickness of the armrest, and the profile of the backrest and pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, unadorned backrest and the solid, boxy structure of the sofa.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the armrest, backrest, and pillow arrangement from the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, uniform seat cushion with two loose, matching throw pillows placed at each end; no visible back cushions.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide, and boxy armrests at each end, matching the height of the seat and backrest, with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a recessed or hidden block-style support integrated into the sofa base.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, and straight backrest with no segmentation or tufting; smooth and unadorned.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
